name: graph
invariants: output.result.edges.every(e => output.result.nodes.some(n => n.id === e.from) && output.result.nodes.some(n => n.id === e.to))
_note: worldmodel.graph (LENS_ACTIONS handler, server/domains/worldmodel.js). Returns the full per-user entity/relation graph with node degree computed from the real edges; an edge whose endpoint was filtered out is DROPPED (the last invariant pins no dangling edges). Empty STATE → { nodes:[], edges:[], nodeCount:0, edgeCount:0 } with ok:true. Served via /api/lens/run's LENS_ACTIONS-first dispatch, not the server.js MACROS path; exercised behaviorally in server/tests/worldmodel-lens-macros.test.js. Read-only.
